summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Sales Dashboard feature. All 18 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms all features working: revenue summary stats, GST breakdown, transactions table, filters, search, export CSV, user navigation, and transaction details modal.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: SalesManagement.jsx correctly implements all required features: revenue stats, GST breakdown, filters, search, export, pagination
UserPurchasesPage.jsx correctly displays user purchase history with summary stats and GST breakdown
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Backend sales_admin.py correctly calculates GST (18%) and provides all required endpoints
seed_data_creation: 5 sample transactions already exist in payment_orders collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Admin Dashboard fully tested and working. Test data includes 5 transactions for Admin User with various purchase types (Subscription, Coaching, Single Session, Top-Up, Cohort). All filters, search, export, and navigation features verified.

GET /api/admin/sales/summary.details: Returns total_revenue, GST breakdown, period revenues, revenue_by_type

GET /api/admin/sales/transactions.details: Returns paginated transactions with filters (type, status, date, search)

GET /api/admin/sales/transactions/{id}.details: Returns detailed transaction info with user and payment data

GET /api/admin/sales/users/{userId}/purc.details: Returns user profile, purchase summary, and complete purchase history

GET /api/admin/sales/export.details: Returns CSV/JSON export with all transaction data

GET /api/admin/sales/purchase-types.details: Returns list of purchase types for filter dropdown

elements_verified: Total Spent, GST Paid, Purchases, Avg Purchase stats
Customer info with View History link

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data
